description: Negative/error-path: action notifications on any channel have strictly monotonically increasing serverSeq values. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: transport.serverSeq.edge.out-of-order-seq. serverSeq values MUST be monotonically increasing per channel. An out-of-order serverSeq indicates transport layer failure (guaranteed ordering is a transport requirement).

steps.label: send reconnect to trigger the error condition
